ember-orange.$description: Ember Orange — Orange supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

verdant-green.$description: Verdant Green — Green supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis

signal-red-orange.$description: Signal Red-Orange — Secondary warm accent visible in app screen UI elements and supporting brand moments. Sits one step hotter than Ember Orange for emphasis on selected or active app states

sky-blue.$description: Sky Blue — Cool counter-accent for app-internal data categories (carbs/protein/other nutrient groupings). Balances the warm-dominant palette inside phone mockups

mist-blue.$description: Mist Blue — Muted cool accent — softens Sky Blue for secondary data labels and chart backgrounds inside the app surfaces

sunset-orange.$description: Sunset Orange — Warm accent for secondary headings and emphasis text within the marketing pages

amber.$description: Amber — Deep warm accent for data-heavy text and chart labels in the app's nutrition displays

alert-red.$description: Alert Red — Red supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis

plum.$description: Plum — Accent for the carbs/protein/fat macro rings and category tags inside the app interface

iris.$description: Iris — Accent for headings and emphasis text on supporting pages, and for specific data categories inside the app

electric-blue.$description: Electric Blue — Accent for bold headings and highlighted text on supporting pages

graphite.$description: Graphite — Primary text, dark buttons (App Store badge), and icon strokes. The dominant non-white color in headings and body copy

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Maximum-emphasis text and icon fills. Used sparingly — reserved for the darkest typographic moments and SVG icon details

fog.$description: Fog — Alternate canvas for cards, feature sections, and soft UI containers. Distinguishes elevated content blocks from the white page

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Dominant page background, button text, and card surfaces. The base layer of the entire visual system

aquawax-pro-medium.$description: Aquawax Pro Medium — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

aquawax-pro.$description: Primary brand typeface used across all display, heading, and body contexts. The custom face has a wide x-height, rounded geometric forms, and friendly proportions. Bold (700) is used for the 60px display and 30px section headlines — these are the system's typographic anchors. DemiBold (600) handles subheadings and button labels at 14–16px. Medium (500) carries body copy at 17–20px with generous 1.6–1.8 line-height for comfortable reading.

system-sans-serif.$description: Fallback for very small UI text and icon labels. Aquawax Pro is not used at micro sizes; system font handles them to keep render weight low.

aquawax-pro-demibold.$description: Aquawax Pro DemiBold — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

paper-white.$description: Surface level 0: Dominant page canvas and base surface

fog.$description: Surface level 1: Alternate canvas for feature sections and soft card containers

graphite.$description: Surface level 2: Dark inverted surface for the App Store download badge

ember-orange.$description: Surface level 3: High-emphasis filled surface for the primary header button
